reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/supplication asking for blessings through the Quran. It contains no extremist content, violence, or ISIS-related themes.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: اللهم اجعل القران ربيع قلوبنا و احعله يا رب انيسا لنا في قبرنا و شافعا لنا يوم نلقاك فيه 🍃امين يا رب
